void-black.$description: Void Black — Page canvas, hero backgrounds, deepest surface — the obsidian backdrop against which the brand violet glows

obsidian-surface.$description: Obsidian Surface — Elevated card surfaces, button fills for neutral/ghost controls, hero overlays

carbon-border.$description: Carbon Border — Hairline borders across cards, nav, body, links, and lists — the structural grid in a single near-black tone

graphite-card-edge.$description: Graphite Card Edge — Card-specific border tone, one step lighter than Carbon to create layered card edges

ash-mist.$description: Ash Mist — Subtle violet-tinted dark border for sections and footer dividers — the only near-gray with hue

platinum-text.$description: Platinum Text — Primary body and UI text, nav links, card text, icon strokes — soft white for long-form reading on black

foil-highlight.$description: Foil Highlight — Display headings, brand mark, button labels on dark — pure white reserved for the loudest type moments

steel-muted.$description: Steel Muted — Muted helper text, secondary list items, dimmed icon strokes — quiet copy in the body

portal-violet.$description: Portal Violet — Primary action buttons, icon strokes, accent text, shadow tint — the singular brand signal; lavender that reads as dimensional energy

wisteria.$description: Wisteria — Muted violet border for accent rules and decorative dividers

indigo-plum.$description: Indigo Plum — Violet badge border for category tags in the violet family

lavender-mist.$description: Lavender Mist — Violet badge text fill — desaturated lavender for readable on-dark violet tag content

fuchsia-ink.$description: Fuchsia Ink — Pink/magenta badge border for editorial or community-event categories

verdant-edge.$description: Verdant Edge — Green outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

mint-whisper.$description: Mint Whisper — Success badge text — soft mint for green category labels on dark

cobalt-vein.$description: Cobalt Vein — Blue outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

deep-tide.$description: Deep Tide — Blue outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

ice-blue.$description: Ice Blue — Info badge text — desaturated sky for blue category labels on dark

suisse-intl.$description: Sole typeface. Weight 900 at 72px/48px for display and section headings is the signature — the brand does not whisper at scale, it announces. Weight 600 for sub-headings and nav, weight 500 for emphasized body, weight 400 for body and supporting copy. The lineHeight 1.00–1.11 at display sizes is unusually tight and signals confidence; body sits at 1.43–1.56 for compact reading. Letter-spacing tracks the hierarchy: -0.025em pulls display tight, 0.05em relaxes body, 0.20em stretches labels and badges wide.

void.$description: Surface level 0: Page canvas and hero backgrounds

obsidian.$description: Surface level 1: Elevated cards, button fills, hero overlays

carbon-edge.$description: Surface level 2: Card border layer, creating perceptible card edges on the void

portal-glow.$description: Surface level 3: Brand accent surface — action buttons and the violet shadow halo around cards
